calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-18-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Louis J. Bonsignore.

Dept. 505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:44:14 a.m. and concluding at 9:51:04 a.m.(D505)

Hootan Atefyekta, Esq. appearing for and on behalf of Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Louis J. Bonsignore not appearing.
Witness for Plaintiff Mariana Echeverria-Licona was placed under oath and testified via Zoom Video Conference.

Plaintiff's complaint for Common Counts/ Open Book Account/Collections filed February 15, 2022.
Proof of personal service as to Defendant on March 30, 2023.
Default entered as to Defendatn on February 15, 2023.

Plaintiff's counsel to briefly summarize the case and provide offer of proof to the Court.

The plaintiff submits the following exhibit/s for the Court's review:

Exhibit 1: Declaration....ID/EVID

The Court addresses witness wherein witness confirms that the declaration submitted is true and correct.

The matter is submitted.

Based on the declaration and testimony, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A. and against Defendant Louis J. Bonsignore as follows:

Damages $34,225.88
Interest $0
Costs $0
Attorney's Fees $0

Proposed judgment signed and filed this day.
